twitch_info.title: I Wanna Kill The Kamilia 2 WARPED - any% for WR

message.body: streaming at a crazy unusual time

pretty uncommon not hearing your keyboard sounds

and it's not even the hottest part of france ftr

as much as i like the heat and warm season, places that have never reached 40 before is no joke, i have heard we are about to get the hottest summer in the history of Europe, so gl to the best of you
@Daglom the hottest summer, FOR NOW, jsut wait till next year :3
